payload.claim: An agent verifies complete three-layer KB binding: kbHash on Base anchors identity, cid stored on-chain at publish time enables IPFS retrieval, and keccak256(fetched_bytes) == artifactHash confirms content integrity without trusting the storage provider.
steps: Pin ipfs/kb-f/ artifact directory to IPFS via pnpm run ipfs:kb-f:pin
Publish KB-F to Base mainnet with real CID via pnpm run ipfs:kb-f:publish
Resolve kbHash from KBPublished event in publish transaction receipt
Call registry.getKnowledgeBlock(kbHash) to read the on-chain cid field
Fetch <cid>/artifact.json from any public IPFS gateway
Confirm result equals the artifactHash committed in the canonical envelope
